modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to transfer SPSS license to a new computer

full_description_text:  
User wants to move their SPSS license.  
The license is currently on an older computer.  
They need it on a newer computer for better performance.  
Request submitted through self-service form.
